spell.cantrip.shocking_touch.name: Shocking Touch
spell.cantrip.shocking_touch.description:
[key.flag.electric](Shock) the target you're looking at with a whisper, potentially [key.mechanic.stagger](Staggering) them.
Deals [key.variable.positive]({0}) [key.flag.electric] [key.mechanic.damage].
spell.cantrip.ember.name: Ember
spell.cantrip.ember.description: Shoot a bolt of [key.flag.fire](flame) that deals [key.variable.positive]({0}) [key.flag.fire] [key.mechanic.damage].
spell.cantrip.hailstone.name: Hailstone
spell.cantrip.hailstone.description:
Send out a deadly blade of [key.flag.frost](ice), dealing [key.variable.positive]({0}) [key.flag.frost] [key.mechanic.damage].
This spell can [key.mechanic.critical_hit](Critically Hit) and [key.mechanic.trigger] [key.mechanic.execute](Executions).
